title: begonia inermis
intro: Begonia inermis, also known as the iron cross begonia, is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Begonia inermis have been used in herbal medicine, possessing antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Begonia inermis are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
